temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A man with graying hair, wearing a light-colored suit, is seen in profile, smoking a cigarette. He holds an old-style flip phone to his ear, with a greenish, hazy light reflecting off the surface. (Storyline: The scene introduces a character who appears to be a figure of authority or a key player in a criminal operation, communicating with someone.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Neutral, informative. 2) Background sounds or music: Faint ambient noise.)
(00:02-00:07) At night, a man in a black shirt stands by a car, talking on his phone. He looks concerned as he listens to the person on the other end. He asks if it's too much to ask for some goods and to check if there are any police around. (Storyline: This character is making a request for illicit goods, establishing the criminal context of the story. His concern about the police presence adds a layer of tension.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Concerned, slightly anxious. 2) Background sounds or music: Crickets chirping, indicating a quiet, rural or suburban night.)
